flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 36% at Excelsior University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (12.7k vs 19.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Excelsior University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (15.3k → 11.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Excelsior University rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.1k → $13.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Excelsior University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
